name: chronic_students_at_risk
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM main_analytics.v_chronic_absenteeism_risk WHERE risk_level IN ('Critical', 'High');

name: chronic_absence_rate
query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN chronic_absence_flag = true THEN 100 ELSE 0 END), 1) as rate FROM main_analytics.v_chronic_absenteeism_risk;

name: chronic_declining_attendance
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM main_analytics.v_chronic_absenteeism_risk WHERE attendance_trend_90d = 'declining' OR attendance_rate_30d < 85;

name: chronic_risk_distribution
query: SELECT ROUND(chronic_absenteeism_risk_score * 10) / 10 as risk_score, COUNT(*) as student_count FROM main_analytics.v_chronic_absenteeism_risk GROUP BY ROUND(chronic_absenteeism_risk_score * 10) / 10 ORDER BY risk_score;

name: chronic_risk_breakdown
query: SELECT risk_level as risk_classification, COUNT(*) as count FROM main_analytics.v_chronic_absenteeism_risk GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY risk_level;

name: chronic_priority_list
query: SELECT student_key as student_id, grade_level, school_id, ROUND(chronic_absenteeism_risk_score, 2) as risk_score, risk_level, ROUND(attendance_rate_30d, 1) as attendance_30d, discipline_incidents_30d FROM main_analytics.v_chronic_absenteeism_risk WHERE risk_level IN ('Critical', 'High') ORDER BY chronic_absenteeism_risk_score DESC LIMIT 50;

name: chronic_trends_analysis
query: SELECT grade_level, ROUND(AVG(attendance_rate_30d), 1) as avg_30d, ROUND(AVG(attendance_rate_90d), 1) as avg_90d, ROUND(AVG(chronic_absenteeism_risk_score), 1) as avg_risk FROM main_analytics.v_chronic_absenteeism_risk GROUP BY grade_level ORDER BY grade_level;

name: equity_achievement_outcomes
query: SELECT race_ethnicity, english_learner, special_education, economically_disadvantaged, cohort_size, ROUND(avg_gpa, 2), ROUND(pct_good_attendance, 1), ROUND(pct_no_discipline, 1) FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics WHERE cohort_size >= 5 ORDER BY avg_gpa DESC;

name: equity_disparity_index
query: SELECT race_ethnicity as category, ROUND(MAX(avg_gpa) - MIN(avg_gpa), 2) as disparity_index FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics WHERE cohort_size >= 5 GROUP BY race_ethnicity ORDER BY disparity_index DESC;

name: equity_gpa_2_5_by_race
query: SELECT race_ethnicity as grp, ROUND(AVG(pct_gpa_2_5_plus), 1) as gpa_2_5_pct FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics WHERE cohort_size >= 5 GROUP BY race_ethnicity ORDER BY gpa_2_5_pct DESC;

name: equity_academic_risk
query: SELECT race_ethnicity, COUNT(*) as groups, ROUND(AVG(cohort_size), 1) as avg_cohort_size, ROUND(AVG(pct_below_c), 1) as avg_below_c FROM main_analytics.v_equity_outcomes_by_demographics WHERE cohort_size >= 5 GROUP BY race_ethnicity ORDER BY avg_below_c DESC;

name: class_perf_vs_peer
query: SELECT course_id, school_id, grade_level, ROUND(avg_grade_numeric, 2), ROUND(course_avg_grade, 2), ROUND(grade_diff_from_course_avg, 2), enrollment_count FROM main_analytics.v_class_section_comparison ORDER BY grade_diff_from_course_avg DESC;

name: class_top10
query: SELECT course_id, ROUND(AVG(grade_diff_from_course_avg), 1) as learning_gain FROM main_analytics.v_class_section_comparison GROUP BY course_id ORDER BY learning_gain DESC LIMIT 10;

name: class_growth_trajectory
query: SELECT ROUND(avg_grade_numeric / 0.5) * 0.5 as gain_range, COUNT(*) as class_count FROM main_analytics.v_class_section_comparison GROUP BY ROUND(avg_grade_numeric / 0.5) * 0.5 ORDER BY gain_range;

name: perf_key_correlations
query: SELECT correlation_pair, ROUND(correlation_coefficient, 3), data_points, expected_direction, strength FROM main_analytics.v_performance_correlations ORDER BY ABS(correlation_coefficient) DESC;

name: perf_intervention_status
query: SELECT strength, COUNT(*) as correlations FROM main_analytics.v_performance_correlations WHERE strength IS NOT NULL GROUP BY strength ORDER BY correlations DESC;

name: perf_completion_rate
query: SELECT expected_direction, ROUND(AVG(ABS(correlation_coefficient)) * 100.0, 1) as completion_pct FROM main_analytics.v_performance_correlations WHERE expected_direction IS NOT NULL GROUP BY expected_direction ORDER BY completion_pct DESC;

name: perf_roi
query: SELECT expected_direction, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(correlation_coefficient), 3), ROUND(AVG(ABS(correlation_coefficient)) * 100.0, 1) FROM main_analytics.v_performance_correlations WHERE expected_direction IS NOT NULL GROUP BY expected_direction ORDER BY ROUND(AVG(correlation_coefficient), 3) DESC;

name: wellbeing_high_risk
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles WHERE wellbeing_risk_level = 'High';

name: wellbeing_medium_risk
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles WHERE wellbeing_risk_level = 'Medium';

name: wellbeing_multi_domain
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles WHERE high_risk_domain_count >= 2;

name: wellbeing_severe_risk
query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles WHERE wellbeing_risk_score >= 70;

name: wellbeing_domain_breakdown
query: SELECT 'Academic' as domain, SUM(CASE WHEN academic_risk_score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as count FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles UNION ALL SELECT 'Behavioral', SUM(CASE WHEN discipline_risk_score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles UNION ALL SELECT 'Attendance', SUM(CASE WHEN attendance_risk_score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles UNION ALL SELECT 'Multi-Domain', SUM(CASE WHEN high_risk_domain_count >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles;

name: wellbeing_caseload
query: SELECT wellbeing_risk_level, COUNT(*) as student_count FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles GROUP BY wellbeing_risk_level ORDER BY wellbeing_risk_level;

name: wellbeing_resource_allocation
query: SELECT wellbeing_risk_level, COUNT(*) as students, ROUND(AVG(attendance_risk_score), 1), ROUND(AVG(discipline_risk_score), 1), ROUND(AVG(academic_risk_score), 1) FROM main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles GROUP BY wellbeing_risk_level ORDER BY wellbeing_risk_level DESC;
